title: btsv Post Frontmatter
description: Canonical frontmatter schema shared by the editor and all builder templates. additionalProperties is false for strict typing — custom fields are still captured by the editor's parser (extractExtra) during content ingestion.

dateCreated.description: Original creation date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Set once when the post is first created. Required.

dateUpdated.description: Last modification date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Updated every time the post is saved. Required.

datePublished.description: Publication date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Set once when the post is first published (draft becomes false). Optional — user-editable for backdating.

description.description: Short description for SEO, social previews, and post listings.

tags.description: List of tags. Generates /tags/<name> listing pages.

draft.description: If true, the post is excluded from production builds.

id.description: Internal post identifier (timestamp in YYYYMMDD-HHMMSSmm format). Auto-generated, do not edit.

slug.description: URL slug for the published post. Auto-derived from title. Can be overridden. Required for publishing.
